requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 60335-2-24 and UAE Electrical Regime Parameters
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——IEC 60335-2-24与阿联酋电气参数
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——IEC 60335-2-24與阿聯酋電氣參數

summary.en: Household refrigerators sold into UAE channels should use the IEC 60335-2-24 family as the practical safety anchor where MoIAT-relevant conformity scope is applied, with documentation aligned to UAE/Saudi Gulf electrical parameters. The difference from Chinese domestic export defaults is primarily model-level validation context: Chinese CE/CCC or domestic test reports must be mapped to UAE filing conditions and voltage/frequency assumptions before final claims are made.
summary.zh: 在适用MoIAT合规范围的阿联酋渠道销售家用冰箱时，应将IEC 60335-2-24体系作为安全基础，并将文件与阿联酋/海湾地区电气参数一致化。与中国国内出口默认值的差异主要在于型号级验证情景：中国的CCC/CE或国内测试报告必须在提交前与阿联酋申报条件和电压频率假设进行映射。
summary.zht: 在適用MoIAT合規範圍的阿聯酋渠道銷售家用冰箱時，應將IEC 60335-2-24體系作為安全基礎，並將文件與阿聯酋/海灣地區電氣參數一致化。與中國國內出口默認值的差異主要在於型號級驗證情境：中國的CCC/CE或國內測試報告必須在提交前與阿聯酋申報條件和電壓頻率假設進行映射。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24 for household refrigerating appliances
UAE.S / GSO-aligned safety references for electrical appliances where applicable
230/400 V, 50 Hz electrical assumptions used in UAE-facing documentation and testing contexts

summary.en: China requires GB 4706.13 as the mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances, and testing in China is generally performed under the national baseline that is tied to China domestic assumptions. This is valid for China market compliance, but Chinese safety certifications cannot be treated as an automatic substitute for UAE-facing safety conformity files.
summary.zh: 中国对家用冰箱要求GB 4706.13为强制性安全标准，测试通常按中国国内假设体系执行。该体系适用于中国市场合规，但中国安全认证不能自动替代阿联酋面向合规文件。
summary.zht: 中國對家用冰箱要求GB 4706.13為強制性安全標準，測試通常按中國國內假設體系執行。該體系適用於中國市場合規，但中國安全認證不能自動替代阿聯酋面向合規文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — safety of household and similar electrical appliances
GB 4706.1 electrical safety requirements for household appliances
CCC mandatory certification framework for in-scope household appliances

gap.en: The gap is route-aware revalidation. Even where technical clauses are harmonised, imported refrigerators usually need UAE-facing alignment for test setup, installation assumptions, marking, and language. Exporters should not rely only on CCC files and should prepare updated UAE-facing technical documentation reflecting 230/400 V, 50 Hz and local safety expectations.
gap.zh: 差距在于路线化的再确认。即使技术条款有部分协调，进口冰箱通常仍需针对阿联酋对文件、安装假设、标识和语言进行对齐。出口商不应仅依赖CCC文件，应补充反映230/400 V、50 Hz及本地安全期望的阿联酋面向技术资料。
gap.zht: 差距在於路線化的再確認。即使技術條款有部分協調，進口冰箱通常仍需針對阿聯酋對文件、安裝假設、標識和語言進行對齊。出口商不應僅依賴CCC文件，應補充反映230/400 V、50 Hz及本地安全期望的阿聯酋面向技術資料。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the target route includes electrical safety conformity and electrical installation-facing declarations before UAE placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China under GB 4706.13 and CCC for in-scope products before China market placement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UAE-facing fridge safety compliance should be demonstrated with UAE-aligned documentation of IEC 60335 family conformity and local electrical assumptions. Chinese CCC/GB safety results are useful evidence but not a standalone UAE route-closure document.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿联酋面向的冰箱安全合规应通过与当地电气参数一致的IEC 60335系列符合性文件来证明。中国CCC/GB安全结果可作参考，但不能作为阿联酋路径独立结论文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿聯酋面向的冰箱安全合規應透過與當地電氣參數一致的IEC 60335系列符合性文件來證明。中國CCC/GB安全結果可作參考，但不能作為阿聯酋路徑獨立結論文件。
